items.title_en: India's 'blue gold' starts a new drinks industry

items.desc_zh: 龙舌兰植物在印度野生生长，新的酿酒厂正在利用它们来创建烈酒行业。

items.title_en: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
items.title_zh: 法官规定皮罗在美联储调查中的损失应保留在账簿上
items.desc_en: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.
items.desc_zh: 在一项严厉的裁决中，詹姆斯·博阿斯伯格法官驳回了美国哥伦比亚特区检察官珍妮·皮罗 (Jeanine Pirro) 撤销先前命令的请求。

items.title_en: Trump cancels Iran strikes scheduled for Thursday evening
items.title_zh: 特朗普取消原定于周四晚上对伊朗发动的袭击

items.title_en: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor

items.desc_zh: 由于潜在利率上升和技术信号不稳定对价格造成压力，黄金处于今年的最低水平。

items.title_en: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup spot
items.title_zh: 阿尔坦失去世界杯参赛资格后将担任欧洲超级杯裁判
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦在被拒绝参加世界杯后，被任命负责今年夏天晚些时候巴黎圣日耳曼队和阿斯顿维拉队之间的欧洲超级杯比赛。

items.title_en: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
items.title_zh: 科学家称厄尔尼诺现象正在发生并威胁极端天气
items.desc_en: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.
items.desc_zh: 美国科学家表示，厄尔尼诺现象已经正式开始，引发了人们对极端天气和高温的担忧。

items.title_en: SpaceX soon-to-be millionaires are set to spend big on luxury homes, watches and private jet travel

items.desc_zh: SpaceX 的员工必须等待出售股份，但许多人已经在计划如何花掉他们的意外之财。

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO won’t ‘break’ the bull market. But investors are worried about what comes next

items.desc_en: As far as Wall Street is concerned, the stock market has what it takes to absorb the new supply.
items.desc_zh: 就华尔街而言，股市有能力吸收新的供应。

items.title_en: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
items.title_zh: 万斯称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“犯了一些错误”
items.desc_en: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.desc_zh: 美国副总统表示，以色列领导人“积极维护”其国家的利益，但这些利益并不总是与美国的利益保持一致。

items.title_en: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
items.title_zh: 随着反移民情绪高涨，尼日利亚从南非撤离公民
items.desc_en: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.
items.desc_zh: 尼日利亚是最新一个在接到仇外袭击报告后遣返公民的非洲国家。

items.title_en: Pope Leo heads to Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥前往加那利群岛强调移民的危险旅程
items.desc_en: During his visit, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.desc_zh: 在访问期间，教皇将呼吁以人道的方式并尊重地欢迎寻求更好生活的移民。

items.title_en: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing

items.title_en: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
items.title_zh: 尼克斯队球迷疯狂，纽约队实现 NBA 总决赛历史上最大的逆转
items.desc_en: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
items.desc_zh: 周三的结果意味着球队现在距离著名的总决赛胜利仅差一场胜利。

items.title_en: Social media on trial: Four important cases to watch
items.title_zh: 审判中的社交媒体：四个值得关注的重要案件
items.desc_en: Social media firms face thousands of lawsuits, the BBC looks at four which could be significant.
items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.title_en: Four days of extreme rain killed 7% of world's rarest orangutans, study says
items.title_zh: 研究称四天的极端降雨导致世界上 7% 的稀有猩猩死亡
items.desc_en: Climate change-induced weather events are pushing orangutan populations to extinction, says a study.
items.desc_zh: 一项研究称，气候变化引发的天气事件正在将猩猩种群推向灭绝。

items.title_en: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
items.title_zh: 印度航空171号航班坠毁原因引发激烈争论
items.desc_en: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.
items.desc_zh: 调查的最终结论尚未公布，但未来几天可能会公布更多结论。

items.title_en: Olivia Rodrigo sings about heartbreak but she's already chosen her wedding song
items.title_zh: 奥利维亚·罗德里戈 (Olivia Rodrigo) 唱着关于心碎的歌，但她已经选择了婚礼歌曲
items.desc_en: The pop star discusses the difficulty of writing happy songs, and her Glastonbury anxiety attack.
items.desc_zh: 这位流行歌星讨论了创作快乐歌曲的困难，以及她的格拉斯顿伯里焦虑症。

items.title_en: French singer Patrick Bruel faces rape charges
items.title_zh: 法国歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔面临强奸指控
items.desc_en: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.desc_zh: 布鲁尔已接受司法调查，这意味着预审法官将更深入地调查此案。

items.title_zh: 发现距今五百万年的鲸鱼墓地
items.desc_en: The Indian Ocean site is "far beyond anything we had imagined", one researcher says.
items.desc_zh: 一位研究人员表示，印度洋遗址“远远超出了我们的想象”。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.title_zh: 报道称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成 17 人死亡
items.desc_en: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.desc_zh: 据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，其中九人在泰尔德巴镇发生的一系列袭击中丧生。

items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易

items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏

items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。
